Name: the Tortuga Pirates
Description: The Tortuga pirates are among the closest thing the 31st century has to the romantic image of pirates — at least from a distance. Up close, they're still criminals, slavers, raiders, and smugglers.
ReputationStatements: A pirate expects treachery mate. It saves a lot of disappointment.
Try not to rob us before the job’s finished. Professional courtesy 'n all.
Mind yer manners around me crew. They're criminals, and some of them are sensitive about it.
There's treasure waiting out there. We simply need to persuade its current owners to part with it.
This haul's worth a fortune. If it vanishes, I'll assume ye developed expensive tastes.
Yer've got a pirate's instincts, and I mean that as a compliment.
The crew's been singing yer praises. Mostly while drunk, but it still counts! Yer've earned a place at the table.
MissionSuccessStatements: Ha! Now that's a haul worth bragging about! Raise a glass tonight. Yer've earned it.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Fortune wasn't with us this time. She can be a fickle mistress.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Ye abandoned ship before the battle was decided. Yer've left us with empty holds and a mighty long list of grudges.
